'''Toile Senn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[New Jedi Order]] who served in the [[Time/Legends|time]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|War]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], when the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] discovered the rebellious [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] government was secretly building a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], Senn was one of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] sent on the mission to bring [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in line—[[Operation Roundabout]]. He was assigned to Jedi [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Hardpoint Squadron]], and flew an [[XJ6 X-wing starfighter|XJ6 X-wing]] in the Jedi-only unit. As the squadron was attempting to extract other Jedi teams who were on Corellia as part of the operation, Hardpoint Squadron was assaulted by a ground-based anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] barrage. Senn's [[Snubfighter/Legends|snubfighter]] was heavily damaged, forcing him to eject into a nearby explosion, ending the Rodian's life.

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]], Toile Senn was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] of the [[New Jedi Order]] who served in the [[Time/Legends|time]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|War]],<ref name="betrayal" /> which left [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] ravaged by the extra-galactic invaders.<ref name="UF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref> In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], when the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] discovered the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] government was rebelliously building a secret [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], Senn was one of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] sent on the mission to bring [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] into line known as [[Operation Roundabout]]. He was assigned to Jedi [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Hardpoint Squadron]], which was given the designation "Team Womprat" for the operation, and flew an [[XJ6 X-wing starfighter|XJ6 X-wing]] in the Jedi-only [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]]. As part of Operation Roundabout, four other Jedi teams had been sent to the surface of Corellia, as well as to the [[Corellian system/Legends|system's]] ancient [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], [[Centerpoint Station]], on missions designed to weaken the Corellian government.<ref name="betrayal" />

When the Galactic Alliance forces arrived in the Corellian [[Star system/Legends|system]] with the intent of intimidating the Corellians through a show of firepower, Hardpoint Squadron escorted the ground-assault [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] ''[[Chandrila Skies]]'' to extract the Jedi operating on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. As Hardpoint Squadron approached the planet, they encountered eighteen Corellian [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], who headed to engage the Jedi. Without warning, the Corellian fighters broke formation and Hardpoint Squadron was assaulted by a ground-based anti-starfighter barrage. Senn and the other members of Hardpoint survived the initial attack, but the ''Chandrila Skies'' was destroyed. Despite the loss, Skywalker ordered the squadron to continue to head toward the planet to extract the Jedi with or without a shuttle. As the squadron continued through the incoming fire, Senn's [[Snubfighter/Legends|snubfighter]] was shaken to pieces by three near hits, forcing the Rodian to eject. At the apex of the ejection, Senn disappeared into the cloud of another nearby explosion. The [[Death/Legends|death]] of the Rodian was felt by Skywalker nearby, and Hardpoint's strength was reduced to nine. With little time to mourn Senn, Hardpoint Squadron continued with their mission and successfully extracted the other Jedi teams. The Galactic Alliance wasn't as successful, however, as Operation Roundabout turned into a disaster that triggered the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. Senn was only of the first of many Jedi casualties in the conflict, which threatened to tear the Galactic Alliance apart.<ref name="betrayal" />

==Personality and traits==
As a member of the New Jedi Order, Toile Senn was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]. He was a capable [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], who was selected by Grand Master Luke Skywalker to fly in his Jedi-only Hardpoint Squadron during Operation Roundabout.<ref name="betrayal" />

==Behind the scenes==
Toile Senn was created by author [[Aaron Allston]] as a minor character in the first novel of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' series, ''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'', released in [[2006]]. He only appears once when Luke Skywalker witnesses his death.<ref name="betrayal" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
